{{Infobox character
| name = Eminence Core
| aliases = Core
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Eminence Core]] is the [[Zenith Engine]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Eminence Core]] appears as a bonfire with [[ruby]]-red flames.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Core disappeared in a flurry of crimson sparks.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
